assertions.description: shape() is accepted as a value of clip-path with line/move commands.
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0 0, line to 100% 0, line to 100% 100%, line to 0 100%, close)

assertions.description: shape() accepts a curve command with control points.
shape() accepts an arc command (radius and sweep direction).
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0 50%, arc to 100% 50% of 50% cw)

assertions.description: shape() accepts a smooth command for chained Bezier curves.
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0 0, curve to 50% 50% with 25% 0, smooth to 100% 100%)

assertions.description: shape() distinguishes by (relative) from to (absolute) — a `by` line command parses.
shape() is its own function — not the same as path() (path() takes an SVG-string, shape() takes CSS commands).
